dbEquipBonuses.name: Medic's Expertise
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your Incoming Healing and Critical Avoidance is increased by 3,000 when you are moving.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Daily Defiance

dbEquipBonuses.name: Rising Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: When hit by a foe you gain 95 Defense for 4 seconds. This effect can stack a maximum of 10 times.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Rising Precision
dbEquipBonuses.description: On hitting a foe you gain 75 Crit for 4 seconds. This effect can stack a maximum of 10 times.
